T0032.title: AB Loan Scam
T0032.description: An AB loan is a type of loan fraud, also known as proxy lending, assisted lending, or relationship-based lending. In this scheme, A is the person needing funds but has poor credit and cannot obtain a loan directly. B, who has good credit, is deceived into acting as a guarantor or the primary loan applicant. The loan funds are actually used by A, while B unknowingly becomes the ultimate debtor, bearing the debt and repayment responsibility.

references.title: Credit Fraud Risk Situation Report for the First Half of 2024
